title: acantholippia seriphioides
intro: Acantholippia seriphioides, commonly known as "Coyotillo", is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. The Coyotillo plant is known for its various health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing pain and swelling, as well as protecting the body against oxidative stress. The therapeutic actions of Acantholippia seriphioides include its antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiviral properties, which can aid in the treatment of infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties and potential health benefits.
